raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The section simultaneously acknowledges systems (CockroachDB 30–40 ms, SLOG single-digit ms) that already surpass the Spanner 100–150 ms baseline, then claims ChronoCommit constitutes a 'meaningful step forward' by merely matching that same baseline; verifying this logical tension is central to any technical review.","R1.3":"The 18% abort-rate reduction and YCSB-T benchmark figures are concrete quantitative claims; a reviewer must assess whether these numbers are grounded in reported experimental evidence or are asserted without support.","R1.4":"Novelty is load-bearing here: if competing deployed systems already beat the Spanner floor that ChronoCommit only reaches, the contribution delta shrinks to the abort-rate axis alone—this must be evaluated explicitly against the nearest prior work.","R1.7":"Two specific papers (Corbett et al. 2012, Ren et al. 2019) and three production systems are cited with attributed figures; verifying that those figures are faithfully represented and that the citation scope is adequate is a core review duty."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical and argumentative soundness (logical consistency, novelty claims, evidence-claim alignment) or writing and presentation quality (prose clarity, structure, style)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The section simultaneously acknowledges systems (CockroachDB 30–40 ms, SLOG single-digit ms) that already surpass the Spanner 100–150 ms baseline, then claims ChronoCommit constitutes a 'meaningful step forward' by merely matching that same baseline; verifying this logical tension is central to any technical review.
rationale.R1.3: The 18% abort-rate reduction and YCSB-T benchmark figures are concrete quantitative claims; a reviewer must assess whether these numbers are grounded in reported experimental evidence or are asserted without support.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty is load-bearing here: if competing deployed systems already beat the Spanner floor that ChronoCommit only reaches, the contribution delta shrinks to the abort-rate axis alone—this must be evaluated explicitly against the nearest prior work.
rationale.R1.7: Two specific papers (Corbett et al. 2012, Ren et al. 2019) and three production systems are cited with attributed figures; verifying that those figures are faithfully represented and that the citation scope is adequate is a core review duty.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical and argumentative soundness (logical consistency, novelty claims, evidence-claim alignment) or writing and presentation quality (prose clarity, structure, style)?
